title: Lt3 pack
description: LT3 Pack is a blue-themed 132x PvP resource pack for Minecraft. The pack features clean and detailed textures designed to make PvP look smooth while keeping good visibility during combat.
body:
An perfect Minecraft Sword PvP Pack clean, simple, smooth, and designed by one of the greatest PvP players of all time.
Minimal visuals,, short swords, custom particles, and optimized FPS for the ultimate competitive experience.
Built for players who want precision, speed, and pure skill  no distractions, just domination.
